name: innov8ors-full-stack
description: Full stack Innov8ors application with auto-payment

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../IIT && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run frontend" "npm run ai"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run frontend" "npm run ai"
